company.name: Badass Laboratory
company.description: Practical apps and digital tools for real humans doing real-life things: riding, planning, organizing, automating, and making the chaos easier to manage.

projects.name: Kickstands Up
projects.description: A motorcycle route planning app built for riders who want less planning and more riding.

projects.name: Hearth & Hoard
projects.description: A household planning and organization app being shaped around practical systems and everyday chaos control.

projects.name: Spin-the-Wheel Meal Planner
projects.description: A meal planning app concept designed to make recipe selection, grocery planning, and weekly menus less annoying.

updates.title: Badass Laboratory site launched
updates.note: The first one-page project dashboard is live.

updates.title: KSU beta demo added
updates.note: Kickstands Up is now featured as the current beta app.

updates.title: Hearth & Hoard added
updates.note: H&H is listed as an app under active development.
